mapper.insert: INSERT INTO Post (title, content, created_at, category_id, user_id) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, NOW(), #{categoryId}, #{userId})
mapper.select:
SELECT p.post_id, p.title, p.content, p.created_at, p.category_id, p.deleted_at, p.modified_at, p.user_id, u.nickname, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Like_Post WHERE post_id = p.post_id) as like_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Comment WHERE post_id = p.post_id AND deleted_at IS NULL) as comment_count,
EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM Like_Post WHERE post_id = p.post_id AND user_id = #{userId}) as liked
false as liked
FROM Post p JOIN User u ON p.user_id = u.user_id WHERE p.post_id = #{postId} AND p.deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT * FROM Post WHERE deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE Post SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, category_id = #{categoryId}, modified_at = NOW() WHERE post_id = #{postId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO Comment (post_id, parent_comment_id, content, created_at, user_id) VALUES (#{postId}, #{parentCommentId}, #{content}, NOW(), #{userId})
mapper.select: SELECT c.comment_id, c.post_id, c.parent_comment_id, c.content, c.created_at, c.modified_at, c.deleted_at, c.user_id, u.nickname, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Like_Comment WHERE comment_id = c.comment_id) as like_count FROM Comment c JOIN User u ON c.user_id = u.user_id WHERE c.post_id = #{postId} AND ( c.deleted_at IS NULL OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Comment child WHERE child.parent_comment_id = c.comment_id AND child.deleted_at IS NULL) ) ORDER BY c.created_at ASC
SELECT c.*, u.nickname FROM Comment c JOIN User u ON c.user_id = u.user_id WHERE c.comment_id = #{commentId} AND c.deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE Comment SET content = #{content}, modified_at = NOW() WHERE comment_id = #{commentId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO Like_Comment (comment_id, post_id, user_id) VALUES (#{commentId}, #{postId}, #{userId})
mapper.select: SELECT p.*, COUNT(lp.post_id) AS like_count FROM Post p LEFT JOIN Like_Post lp ON p.post_id = lp.post_id WHERE p.created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 3 DAY) AND p.deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY p.post_id ORDER BY like_count DESC, p.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT p.post_id, p.title, p.category_id, SUBSTRING(p.content, 1, 20) as content, p.created_at, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Like_Post WHERE post_id = p.post_id) as like_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Comment WHERE post_id = p.post_id AND deleted_at IS NULL) as comment_count FROM Post p WHERE p.category_id = #{categoryId} AND p.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY p.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Post WHERE category_id = #{categoryId} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT p.post_id, p.title, p.category_id, SUBSTRING(p.content, 1, 20) as content, p.created_at, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Like_Post WHERE post_id = p.post_id) as like_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Comment WHERE post_id = p.post_id AND deleted_at IS NULL) as comment_count FROM Post p WHERE p.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY like_count DESC, p.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Post WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE Post SET title = #{dto.title}, content = #{dto.content}, category_id = #{dto.categoryId}, modified_at = NOW() WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND user_id = #{userId}
